name: Bowdoin College
meets_full_need_notes: Bowdoin meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Bowdoin eliminated loans from all financial aid packages. All aid is grant-based (no loans, no parental PLUS loan expectation built in). Work-study may be included.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive identical need-based aid as RD. Bowdoin allows ED students to withdraw if the financial aid package is not adequate.
special_programs: Bowdoin Fly-In program for low-income/first-gen students
appeal_policy: Bowdoin encourages appeals when financial circumstances change. Professional judgment applied; families submit updated documentation.
